mapper.select:
select * from cgq_sbgl
and qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.qyid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.qyid}))
and qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.ssid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.ssid}))
and bj = '1'
and bj = '2'
and sbbh like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbbh}), '%')
and mc like concat(concat('%', #{param.mc}), '%')
and dz like concat(concat('%', #{param.dz}), '%')
select * from cgq_sj where sbbh = #{param.sbbh} and time BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59') order by time desc

select * from cgq_sbgl
and qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.qyid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.qyid}))
and bj = '1'
and bj = '2'
select sbbh from cgq_sbgl where jd = #{jd} and wd = #{wd}
mapper.update: update cgq_sbgl set sbbh = #{sbbh}, jd = #{jd}, wd = #{wd}, fzr = #{fzr}, fzrxm = #{fzrxm}, dz = #{dz}, mc = #{mc}, qyid = #{qyid}, qymc = #{qymc}, fz = #{fz}, fzmc = #{fzmc}, deviceid = #{deviceid}, bj = #{bj}, xsfw = #{xsfw} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select a.sbbh,a.fldj,b.jd,b.wd,b.xsfw from (select t.sbbh,t.fldj,t.tdh from(select sbbh,MAX(time) as time from cgq_sj group by sbbh)as temp left join cgq_sj as t on temp.sbbh = t.sbbh and temp.time = t.time order by t.sbbh asc)a, cgq_sbgl b where a.sbbh = b.sbbh
and b.bj = '1'
and b.bj = '2' and a.tdh='10'

select.if: select t.sbbh,t.fldj from (select sbbh,max(xtsj) xtsj from cgq_sj where xtsj between DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 60 MINUTE) and NOW() group by sbbh)as temp, cgq_sj t where temp.sbbh = t.sbbh and temp.xtsj = t.xtsj

select t.sbbh,t.fldj from (select sbbh,max(time) time from cgq_sj where time between DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 60 MINUTE) and NOW() group by sbbh)as temp, cgq_sj t where temp.sbbh = t.sbbh and temp.time = t.time
